{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324000701976A0B40D86BDD3BE36D"}"},"total":1292},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7589293596777366296","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常不错的一本小说!最后结尾太仓促了，主角的父母还是没有交代。
剧情由一个个案件推动，每个案件之间过渡很短，所以看起来很爽，没有水字数。案件也没有太多心理分析或者人性的黑暗揭露什么的，就是单纯逻辑推理，很单纯的推理。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767022013,"group_id":"7236250708167625785","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新手上路，多多包涵。希望能给读者带来精神上的满足。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzpM6lGu9zr4qiOtssZ75js=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875250&x-signature=oRrJGA6Uz5DR%2BfCISt8M%2BfcegOI%3D","user_id":"149146487500280","user_name":"心笙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"149146487500280","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7236250708167625785","book_info":{"abstract":"二十年前父亲因为追查案件突然失踪，二十年后苏卓子承父业也踏上了从警之路。
触碰案件物证，就能获取其相关提示性记忆画面，破案后更有技能奖励。
从此苏卓在警途一路凯歌。
作案工具，现场遗留物，痕迹，脚印指纹……，只要罪犯留下相关物证，在苏卓手中就无从遁形！
“根据死者颈部伤口，我推测他是被一张纸牌杀死的！”
“纸牌能杀死人？”富有经验的老刑警几乎不敢相信自己耳朵。
“死者是接吻时被毒死的！”苏卓淡定的说道。
“……？”老法医疯了！
而就在破获各色案件中，父亲失踪之谜也逐渐水落石出。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ab8ddd3d3191d774bce3f56493a0ebc1","author":"这键盘挺好用","author_id":"","book_id":"7236250708167625785","book_name":"我能回顾犯罪过程，罪犯心崩了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7236252902023660084","read_count":"12056","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"304100"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"143","tags":"悬疑灵异,推理,破案,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/633ba116269c184eb2ba198897a13dae~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779466021&x-signature=%2F%2BB%2Bz%2F1Mwr8K583RodjH9m6LlvM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"75925426844","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"143"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324000701976A0B40D86BDD3BE36D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":22717,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":22728,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":648},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7281915408683238200","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错不错不错！主角性格沉稳不会因为一些功名利禄而感到激动的心情！不要像其他的主角一样得到一个奖励就开心的要死！都特么有系统了，得到这些不是你应该的吗？有必要这么开心吗？这本写的太好！值得推荐！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1695453691,"group_id":"7236250708167625785","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"吾乃鸿蒙道祖，各位道友好！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N86YCyLlyPX03avLPwbEdyQcG4maRorJRNwl9Z/63TON","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4fe18fefb1e04f78bedcabeab120eb6e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776874491&x-signature=rHh5mT1R3xOd%2FsMCAbqX6L8GXw4%3D","user_id":"3738783269529639","user_name":"鸿蒙道君"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3738783269529639","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1700658359,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7236250708167625785","book_info":{"abstract":"二十年前父亲因为追查案件突然失踪，二十年后苏卓子承父业也踏上了从警之路。
